judge_result.short_rationale: Includes all required actions in the correct order: rinse eye while holding it open for 15-20 minutes, remove contacts after 5 minutes, and call a doctor or poison control immediately. No dangerous added advice. Usability is reduced by hedging and overly explanatory phrasing for an urgent field situation.
